title: Garden Planner AI
tagline: Plan your garden with AI and augmented-reality overlays
description: A concept for a web app that helps you plan what to grow, where and when. Point your camera at a garden bed and see AI-suggested planting layouts as augmented-reality overlays, tuned to your climate zone and the Swedish growing season.
Still on the drawing board — the goal is to combine plant databases, local weather data and image recognition into a planner that feels like a garden designer in your pocket.
features: AI-generated planting suggestions per climate zone
AR overlay preview of beds and layouts
Season calendar with sowing and harvest reminders
